prompt_text:
### Demographics: 70-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Urolithiasis (status post lithotripsy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (mother)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~30 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 68.9 kg; Height 183.3 cm; BMI 20.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 128/85 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.4%; 9 months ago 8.1%; 6 months ago 8.4%; 3 months ago 8.3%; current 8.0%), FPG (12 months ago 175mg/dL; 9 months ago 203mg/dL; 6 months ago 226mg/dL; 3 months ago 204mg/dL; current 184mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 69.9kg; 9 months ago 67.8kg; 6 months ago 71.3kg; 3 months ago 67.7kg; current 68.9kg), Height (12 months ago 183.3cm; 9 months ago 183.3cm; 6 months ago 183.3cm; 3 months ago 183.3cm; current 183.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 20.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 127mmHg; 9 months ago 128mmHg; 6 months ago 130mmHg; 3 months ago 130mmHg; current 128mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 82mmHg; 9 months ago 82mmHg; 6 months ago 83mmHg; 3 months ago 81mmHg; current 85mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 10U/L; 9 months ago 9U/L; 6 months ago 18U/L; 3 months ago 18U/L; current 15U/L), AST (12 months ago 33U/L; 9 months ago 24U/L; 6 months ago 30U/L; 3 months ago 20U/L; current 28U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.3mg/dL; current 0.3mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 34mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 35mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 32mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 35mL/min/1.73m²; current 32mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 66mg/g; 9 months ago 100mg/g; 6 months ago 102mg/g; 3 months ago 82mg/g; current 107mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 102mg/dL; 9 months ago 100mg/dL; 6 months ago 99mg/dL; 3 months ago 95mg/dL; current 98mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 51mg/dL; 9 months ago 54mg/dL; 6 months ago 55mg/dL; 3 months ago 52mg/dL; current 53mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 115mg/dL; 9 months ago 134mg/dL; 6 months ago 120mg/dL; 3 months ago 121mg/dL; current 126mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 10.2g/dL; 3 months ago 10.0g/dL; current 10.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.74 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
